Nu Quantum, the leading quantum networking company, and SoftwareQ, the leading quantum software company, are collaborating on a project to build the theoretical framework for the first fault-tolerant quantum computer.

Sponsored by the UK and Canadian governments, Nu Quantum, led by Dr. Carmen Palacios-Berraquero, and SoftwareQ, Co-founded by Dr. Vlad Gheorghiu and Prof. Michele Mosca, will propose and benchmark practical architectural solutions.

Sponsored by the UK and Canadian governments, Nu Quantum, led by Dr. Carmen Palacios-Berraquero, and SoftwareQ, Co-founded by Dr. Vlad Gheorghiu and Prof. Michele Mosca, will propose and benchmark practical architectural solutions.

Working together, Nu Quantum and SoftwareQ are using hardware-software codesign techniques to integrate SoftwareQ's advanced compiler technology into the real-time firmware of Nu Quantum's control system.
